title: Nakhon Ratchasima、Nakhon Ratchasima — 生活費、住宅、移住ガイド [2026]
description: Nakhon Ratchasima、Nakhon Ratchasimaの完全ガイド：生活費、住宅価格、近隣地域、リモートワークの準備、移住のヒント。
content:
概要

Nakhon RatchasimaはNakhon Ratchasimaにある人口450,000の都市です。Known as Korat, this gateway to northeastern Thailand offers a very affordable lifestyle with access to both urban amenities and natural attractions like Khao Yai National Park.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
